statement: In every magma, Equation 584 (`x = y * (z * (z * (w * y)))`) implies Equation 3851 (`x * y = (z * w) * (w * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0359
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op z (op w y))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) (op w x))
